Helper library for easier software development on FreeRTOS on ARM, used by main and Bluetooth firmware.

# Purpose
`libOS` is a helper library designed to facilitate software development on top of FreeRTOS for ARM architectures. It is utilized by the main firmware and the Dialog Bluetooth firmware. The library depends on `libc`, `libutil`, FreeRTOS, and requires an `<mcu.h>` header file that includes CMSIS headers such as `core_cmX.h` and `core_cmFunc.h`. Additionally, it requires several platform-specific functions, which are detailed in `platform.c`.
